title: Automate login and verify each main page loads correctly in OrangeHRM after successful authentication.
description: Validate that the OrangeHRM demo application works correctly after login. The test should ensure: User can successfully log in, each main page is accessible after login, each page returns a valid response (status + UI load check). This will help ensure core navigation is stable for regression testing.
test_steps: Navigate and verify My Info page
expected_results: User should be logged in successfully
Each module/page should load without crash
Each module/page should display correct UI components
No broken links or blank pages
acceptance_criteria: No navigation failures or UI errors
Test can run in CI pipeline (if automated)
